results.notes: pyserial 3.5, STM32_Programmer_CLI v2.20.0, COM7 detected, ST-LINK V3J9M3
Pin('PA5') not available — G4 uses board-level names (LED1, SW). Pin.toggle() not available, used manual toggle fallback
VCP is LPUART1 (not UART2). UART1 and UART3 available. UART2/4/5 not in build.
SPI1 at 1-4 MHz, write/read/full-duplex all OK. SPI1 shares PA5 with LED.
A0, A1, internal temp, internal VREF all OK. Noisy on floating pins (expected).
pyb.DAC on A2/PA4. DAC-ADC cross-verify needs jumper (no wire connected).
machine.PWM on D12/PA6, 1-5 kHz, duty sweep OK
WDT 5s timeout, 5 feeds + 3s delay OK. Caused board lockup after test — needed process kill to recover COM7.
Pin.irq on SW/PC13, no spurious triggers
FDCAN1 loopback works with setfilter(0, CAN.MASK, 0, (0,0)). Single-message loopback verified. Multi-message FIFO timeout (FDCAN quirk).
